tasks.subject: Task 1: Index-aware wallpaper functions + epoch signal (session.svelte.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make loadWallpaper/setWallpaper/clearWallpaper take a workspace index, add the wallpaperEpoch change signal and a setWallpaperForCurrent convenience, all unit-tested.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts; create app/tests/unit/desktop/wallpaper.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/desktop/wallpaper.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/desktop/wallpaper.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/desktop/wallpaper.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setWallpaper(blob,i) writes only desktop:wallpaper:i and bumps epoch", "loadWallpaper(i) per-ws then legacy fallback then null", "clearWallpaper(i) deletes key and bumps epoch", "wallpaperEpoch getter + setWallpaperForCurrent target currentWorkspace", "npm run check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Reactive per-workspace wallpaper render (DesktopWorkspace.svelte)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load the active workspace's wallpaper reactively (on switch + on wallpaperEpoch) with an async race guard; make drag-drop target the current workspace.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/DesktopWorkspace.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/DesktopWorkspace.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wallpaper matches active workspace, swaps on switch", "token guard prevents stale wallpaper on fast switch", "drag-drop sets only current workspace", "no ObjectURL leak (revoke on swap + unmount)", "npm run check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Right-click image → 바탕화면으로 지정 (ImageActionMenu.svelte)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a desktop-only third item to the image right-click menu that sets the clicked image as the current workspace's wallpaper.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/components/ImageActionMenu.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check && npm run test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/components/ImageActionMenu.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["item shown on /desktop, absent on mobile routes", "click sets current-workspace wallpaper + success toast + close", "fetch failure toasts error and leaves wallpaper unchanged", "npm run check + full suite pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Guide card in 설정 → 가이드 (env sub-tab)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the feature in the user-facing guide (env sub-tab of 설정 → 가이드).

**Files:** Modify app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["env-tab guide-card covers desktop-only + per-workspace + right-click + drag-drop + no-removal-UI", "matches existing card pattern", "npm run check passes"]}
```
